  • Velvet Scoter
    More info
    eBird
     2 Musselburgh--Sea Wall (Evan Garner) "Tricky ID. Seen distantly with a scope. Prominent white wing patch. White mark under eye. Yellowish-orange bill. First impression was wing patch too broad and large for velvet scoter. Thought it was a Whit[...]"

  • Red-crested Pochard
    More info
    eBird
     1 Whitesands Quarry (Simon Bourne) "Female at East end with Tufted Duck"
  • Red-crested Pochard
    More info
    eBird
     1 Whitesands Quarry (Sam Shutt) "Known female. In a flock of Tufted duck and Pochard on the east side of the quarry, around the area of a dirt vehicle track. Best viewable from the view point on the opposite side of the quarry. Photographed."
  • Red-crested Pochard
    More info
    eBird
     1 Whitesands Quarry From cement Works Side (Stuart Housden) "Female, reported earlier"
  • Red-crested Pochard
    More info
    eBird
     1 Whitesands Quarry (David Kelly) "Known female associated with the Common Pochard. Larger grey coloured duck with pale cheeks and dark cap."
